name: python -m doctest
description: Python doctest — test interactive examples embedded in docstrings

subcommands.name: -v file.py
subcommands.description: Run doctests verbosely showing each test case

subcommands.name: file.txt
subcommands.description: Run doctests from a plain text file

subcommands.name: file.py
subcommands.description: Run doctests in a Python module (quiet mode)

globalOptions.name: -v
globalOptions.description: Verbose mode — display each test and its result

globalOptions.name: -o ELLIPSIS
globalOptions.description: Enable ellipsis matching in expected output
